questions.content:
LISTENING
Part 4 0
52
Questions 20-25
For each question, choose the correct answer.
You will hear an interview with a woman called Florence Adams, who helps people with job interviews.
20 What does Florence say about starting preparation for a job interview?

options.text: Find out more about the company first.
Decide whether you would be happy to work in another country.
Ask people in the local area about the company.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 7 của test7.

options.text:
Please leave lights on as some people are
working late.
From: keith@luxuz.com

The last one to finish work should switch off
Hi lights.
Lately office lights have been

Do not leave the office without leaving a light on.
left on when the building is
empty. Could you make sure
that the last person to leave
turns them off.
Thanks
Keith

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 2 của test7.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about living in the countryside.
What does the woman say?

options.text: It would be good for her health.
It's difficult to do your shopping.
It can feel lonely.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 11 của test7.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about travelling by plane.
The man thinks

options.text: we should take more holidays at home.
flights are too expensive.
flying is faster than going by train.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 12 của test7.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a local businesswoman.
What does the man say about her?

options.text: She is looking for a business partner.
She supports local businesses.

She is thinking of opening a new shop.
156

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 13 của test7.

questions.content: What does Corinna say about litter?

options.text: People should request more litter bins.
You should clear the area where you've been camping.
People often leave litter in their tent.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 14 của test7.

questions.content: If you don·t have much experience in an area, Florence suggests

options.text: asking if the company can help.
not talking about these areas.
still arguing you are perfect for the job.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 22 của test7.

options.text: reading some example interview questions available on the internet.
getting help from other people before the interview.
preparing answers for the interview.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 4 của test7.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a new mobile phone.
The woman says

options.text: it's not much better than her last one.
it doesn't seem to be working properly.
the screen is damaged.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 9 của test7.

questions.content:
You will hear a woman talking to her husband about washing clothes.
The man says the washing machine

options.text: could be fixed quite cheaply.
has never worked properly.
doesn't need replacing.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 10 của test7.

questions.content: Florence feels it is very important that

options.text: the job is good for your career plans.
you focus on why you want to work for the company.
you only take the job if you really want it.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 21 của test7.

questions.content: What does Florence say about asking questions?

options.text: They should focus on what you will be responsible for doing in the job.
You should wait to be invited to ask questions.
They can tell employers more about you as a person.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 23 của test7.

questions.content: What does Florence say you should do when you walk into the room?

options.text: Find a chair to sit down.
Focus on the floor or ceiling to help you relax.

Act as if you are happy to be there.
158

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 25 của test7.
